gaps: Filed briefs or a short case-summary field would materially improve appeal-disposition predictions for sparse circuit dockets.
A safe pre-outcome oral-argument transcript or metadata extractor would help when the snapshot links only to audio.
helpful: The provisioned snapshot made the argument date and opinion-termination signal visible.
The committed statpack gave a non-case-specific label calibration without querying this docket.
notes: I avoided case-specific external retrieval because the snapshot already suggested the matter had terminated and a docket or cluster lookup could reveal the outcome.
